0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Consolidation in the right lower lobe

2.text: Ground-glass appearance in the right lower lobe

3.text: Centrilobular nodules in the right lower lobe

4.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in the left lower lobe basal segments

5.text: Centrilobular nodules in the left lower lobe periphery

6.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules within both lungs
